description:
Offered: Fall
In SPAN 2300, students will develop Spanish skills to communicate in medical emergencies. The course is designed for healthcare providers or individuals needing medical terminology skills and intercultural communication for medical purposes in Spanish. The course focus on listening, speaking, and writing practices set around different medical settings.
Prerequisite(s): SPAN 1000 or permission of instructor
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, DP
